title: Jack Kerouac's Animated Spell Effects: Cartoon
description: Cartoony animated effects for spells for use with various VTTs in the top-down/overhead perspective, as transparent webm files. When Sequencer is active the effects are registered with the Sequencer Database (namespace 'animated-spell-effects-cartoon') so they can be used with Automated Animations, the Sequencer Effect Player, and Sequencer macros (e.g. pf2e-jb2a-macros). A built-in browser is also included to place effects directly on the canvas.

recommends.reason: Registers the effects with the Sequencer Database for use with Automated Animations and macros.
Lets you assign these effects to items and spells automatically.
